caption: A woman is seated in an indoor setting, positioned in front of a plain wall and light-colored curtains. She is wearing a dark-colored striped shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with a small microphone extending toward her mouth. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of the view. Across the sequence, she is speaking and smiling, with her expression shifting from a wide smile with teeth showing to a more closed-mouth expression and then back to an open-mouthed speaking pose. Her head shifts slightly from side to side as she communicates. In the background, a portion of a light-colored piece of furniture, possibly a dresser or cabinet, is visible to her right. The lighting is consistent, and the camera angle remains steady throughout the clip.
